word: G3021 - λευκαίνω - leukaínō - lyoo-kah'-ee-no - Make white

sections.paragraph:
- Original: λευκαίνω

- Transliteration: Leukaino

- Phonetic: lyoo-kah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to whiten, make white

- Origin: from G3022

- TDNT entry: 08:01,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3022; to whiten: - make white whiten.
